creator: tj+freebsd_ports@a13.fr
text:
Created attachment 183600
devel/rubygem-baf shar file

It is a toolkit for building command line programs. It also provides
cucumber helpers and steps for writing user acceptance tests.

  It will be required as a runtime dependency for next version of the
port `x11-wm/rubygem-uh-wm', and is also required for new ports I
would like to submit later.

  I hope chose "devel" category as similar gems like thor and
commander are here:

devel/rubygem-commander
devel/rubygem-thor

  Thanks!
